lesson_snippet.concept_explanation: Stories happen in order. We can retell what happened from beginning to end.
lesson_snippet.common_misconception: Retelling random details instead of story sequence.
lesson_snippet.lesson_summary: Stories have parts we can remember and retell.

worked_example.problem: Story: Sam lost his hat. He found it under the bed.
worked_example.final_answer: Sam lost his hat and found it under the bed.
worked_example.reflection_prompt: Did I tell events in order?

guided_practice.prompt: First, Ana baked cookies. Then she ate one. What happened first?
What is the end of the story? Ben lost his toy and found it.

next_practice_recommendation.reason: Converted planning artifact only; runtime pathway mapping pending.

source_metadata.source_file: Grade 1 English Production Reading Comprehension Skill 6 Story Understanding + Retelling
